task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Jenkins job page specifically for 'Legacy-Ecommerce-Monolith'.

task_completion.description: Open the configuration page for the job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins job configuration page is visible, showing settings like the 'General' tab and project details.

task_completion.description: Update the job description to the required deprecation message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description text box contains exactly 'DEPRECATED: Migrated to microservices pipeline'.
The 'Disable this project' checkbox is checked on the configuration page, OR the 'Disable Project' button is clicked on the main job page.

task_completion.description: Save changes and ensure the job is disabled but not deleted, preserving build history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main job page shows the updated description, a warning stating 'This project is currently disabled' (or similar disabled status indicator), and the 'Build History' panel is still visible on the left side.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jenkins web UI in a browser to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Jenkins interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl or Jenkins CLI commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual forms and buttons genuinely.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to spoof the description or disabled status.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete the job at any point.
integrity.visual_evidence: No 'Delete Project' confirmation screens are shown, and the job remains accessible in the final screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target job name is exactly 'Legacy-Ecommerce-Monolith'. The required description is exactly 'DEPRECATED: Migrated to microservices pipeline'. The job must be set to a 'disabled' status, which is typically indicated in the Jenkins UI by a 'This project is currently disabled' warning message or a checked 'Disable this project' box in the configuration.
